## FASTElementConstructor.from() method

Creates a new FASTElement base class inherited from the provided base type.

**Signature:**

```typescript
from<TBase extends typeof HTMLElement>(BaseType: TBase): {
        new (): InstanceType<TBase> & FASTElement;
    };
```
